name: CMC Metals Ltd.
summary: CMC Metals Ltd. engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties in Canada and the United States. The company explores for silver, zinc, lead, gold, copper, antimony, bismuth, and tungsten deposits. It holds a 100% interest in the Silver Hart property consisting of 116 contiguous full and partial mineral claims covering an area of 2,200 hectares located in the Watson Lake Mining District, Yukon Territories; and Logjam Property, comprising of 32 claims that covers an area of 632 hectares located in south-central Yukon. The company also holds an option to earn up to a 100% working interest in the Blue Heaven Property consisting of 118 contiguous full and partial claims, which cover 1,975 hectares located in the Rancheria Silver District, Yukon Territories; the Terra Nova Property that consists of 71 claims covering an area of approximately 1,775 hectares located in the Gander Subzone in Central Newfoundland; and Rancheria South Property that comprises of 12 mineral tenures covering an area of 2008.32 hectares. In addition, it holds option to acquire 100% Bridal Veil Property, consisting of 150 claims, which covers an area of 3,150 hectares located in Newfoundland. The company was formerly known as Bellevue Capital Corp. and changed its name to CMC Metals Ltd. in July 2005. CMC Metals Ltd. was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
